payload.answer: I could not remember the article because the URL fetch failed with a 404/network error. No durable memory was created. If you provide a working URL, title, excerpt, or summary, I can save it as useful for memory architecture.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched due to a 404/network error, so no durable article memory should be created from unavailable content.

details: Fetch failed for https://example.com/missing with a 404/network error.
No article content was available to verify or store.
No durable memory card was created.

repair_options: Provide a working URL for the article.
Paste the article title and relevant excerpt or summary.
Confirm that you want to save only the unavailable URL as a bookmark with the note: useful for memory architecture.
